description: A field supervisor needs to request a pallet of cement from the on-site warehouse for the next day's work.

nodes.task_description: Create a new request for one pallet of cement, specifying the required delivery location on site and the date needed.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly fills out and submits the material request.

nodes.task_description: Check the status of the request later to confirm it has been approved and scheduled for delivery by the warehouse team.

expected_outcome.value: Agent checks the system and sees the request status is now 'Approved'.
